source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp English product UI and numeric telemetry, with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body copy, labels, and dashboard metrics.
layout: Fluid 8px product grids, compact cards, wave-like section dividers, fin-ray separators, scale-texture panels, 8px radii, readable dashboard density, and restrained shimmer states for repeatable shadcn components.

prompts.label: Transparent betta scale motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Betta Scale transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a betta fish scale detail motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete ornamental patch on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: macro close-up cutout of overlapping betta fish scales and flowing fin edge, teal base scales with crimson blushes and violet iridescent shimmer, pearlescent highlights, tiny ridge texture, aquatic tank light caustics reflected in the scale surface, elegant fluid edges. The subject should be a cohesive scale-detail fragment, not a whole fish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; crisp edge silhouette, visible layered scale structure and fin membrane fringe, no cropping. Studio macro lighting that preserves teal, crimson, violet shimmer and fish-scale texture. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no whole fish body, no aquarium scene, no bubbles, no plants, no gravel, no text, no watermark, no logo, no floor plane, no shadow, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Betta Scale light-mode design-system board
Input images: visible transparent betta scale motif cutout is the visual reference.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Betta Scale", derived from the visible betta fish scale detail cutout. This board is a reusable source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible fluid component system.
Canvas: exactly 3840x2160, wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large readable labels, organized sections, no watermark.
Required visible sections: Morphous Betta Scale, Betta Scale Detail, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract palette, contrast, texture rhythm, and interaction language from teal overlapping betta scales, crimson fin blush, violet iridescent shimmer, pearlescent highlights, scale ridges, fin-ray striations, and aquatic tank darkness. The board must read as betta scale detail specifically, not generic ocean, mermaid, neon cyber, or purple-blue gradient UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; include labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値, Noto Sans JP. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary, secondary, ghost, destructive buttons with hover, pressed, disabled, and loading states; inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, aquarium telemetry/data widgets, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, token code snippets, subtle icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, fluid component system with wave-like section dividers, overlapping scale texture, fin-ray hairline separators, teal primary actions, crimson critical/action accents, violet shimmer focus states, aquatic dark ink contrast used sparingly in light mode, pearlescent panels that remain readable.
Color palette: use motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals: pearl white, tank glass mist, betta teal, deep lagoon, crimson fin, violet shimmer, iris blue highlight, scale graphite, ink black. Avoid a dominant generic purple/blue gradient; keep teal, crimson, and violet balanced with pearlescent neutral surfaces.
Constraints: no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Betta Scale", no whole fish mascot, no aquarium plants, no bubbles as decoration, no generic purple/blue gradient dominance, no neon cyberpunk, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no unrelated saturated colors.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Betta Scale dark-mode design-system board
Input images: visible transparent betta scale motif cutout and visible Morphous Betta Scale light-mode board are references.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Betta Scale". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible betta fish scale detail cutout.
Canvas: exactly 3840x2160, wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large readable labels, organized sections, no watermark.
Required visible sections: Morphous Betta Scale, Betta Scale Detail, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same fluid component system language as the visible light board: teal primary actions, deep lagoon surfaces, crimson fin accents, violet shimmer focus states, iris blue highlights, pearlescent text, scale-ridge texture, fin-ray separators, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid, 8px radius. Must read as betta scale detail and aquatic tank UI, not generic dark SaaS, generic ocean, or neon cyberpunk.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値, Noto Sans JP. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost, destructive buttons with hover, pressed, disabled, and loading states; checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, table rows, sidebar navigation, top navigation, command search palette, aquarium telemetry/data widgets, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, subtle icons.
Visual details: aquatic ink and deep lagoon dark background, readable pearlescent foreground text, teal active states, crimson destructive/error accents, violet shimmer rings and focus states, iris-blue chart highlights, glassy tank mist borders, restrained shimmer texture, crisp cards and controls, scale texture used as section texture samples rather than busy background.
Constraints: no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Betta Scale", no whole fish mascot, no aquarium plants, no bubbles as decoration, no generic purple/blue gradient dominance, no neon cyberpunk, no pure-black-only flat background, no tiny unreadable paragraphs, no unrelated saturated colors.
